summary: Dashboard renders correctly in empty state with proper onboarding flow, but violates brand palette consistency by using generic neutral UI colors instead of the required diner aesthetic palette for authenticated surfaces.

violations.description: Authenticated dashboard uses generic neutral colors (white/gray backgrounds, standard blue links) instead of maintaining brand palette consistency with public surfaces that use diner teal, cream, and defined color system

actions: Apply diner palette colors to authenticated dashboard surfaces - use cream (#fff8ea) for card backgrounds instead of white
Update page background from generic neutral to appropriate diner palette color
Ensure link colors follow brand palette (rose #b83f5f) instead of generic blue
Maintain visual continuity between public marketing surfaces and authenticated dashboard experience
